title: Charge case inside screen/forth screen, left zoom in/out
feature: QSG (Quick Start Guide) - Charge Case Screen
scenario: Verify zoom in/out functionality on the charge case screen by clicking the circle button to zoom in (revealing new text) and clicking again to zoom out to the original view.
steps: Swipe to the fourth screen (charge case screen)
Click the left circle button to zoom in (new text appears)
Click the circle button again to zoom out to the original screen with the charge case inside
expected: The charge case screen zooms in when clicking the left circle button (new text appears), and zooms out to the original view with the charge case inside when clicking the circle button again.
